channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Review: The Odyssey's Music by Ludwig Göransson
item.description: The article critiques the film score for Christopher Nolan's *The Odyssey*, composed by Ludwig Göransson. While the score incorporates ancient instruments and raw, bleak sounds to mirror the film's se...

item.title: Parents of Australian doctor who joined ISIS speak about shock after son found alive in Iraq
item.description: The parents of Tareq Kamleh, an Australian doctor who joined ISIS and was believed dead, have spoken about their devastation after learning he is alive and imprisoned in Iraq. The Red Cross contacted ...

item.title: The Hidden Cost of Constant Agreement: Why Avoiding Conflict May Harm Your Peace
item.description: The article discusses how blind agreement and avoidance of conflict, as highlighted in the book 'The Most Truthful Book of Lies', can lead to internal turmoil rather than peace. It critiques societal ...

item.title: Evangelicals' political influence grows as pastors enter Côte d’Ivoire's political arena
item.description: The article explores the growing political involvement of evangelical Christians in Côte d’Ivoire, where religious leaders are increasingly entering politics. It highlights the case of Stéphane Kipré,...

item.title: President Marcos Inspects Injured Navy Personnel Following Ayungin Shoal Incident
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. recently visited two injured Navy personnel stationed at the Ayungin Shoal, a disputed territory in the South China Sea, to assess their condition and offer support. The...

item.title: CNN Host Reacts to Debate on Congressional Dating Rules and Workplace Culture
item.description: CNN host Audie Cornish and her panelists discussed House Speaker Mike Johnson's push to ban romantic relationships between members of Congress and Capitol Hill staffers. The conversation followed two ...

item.title: Zenith Bank wins Africa’s Best Bank award for 2nd year in a row
item.description: Zenith Bank Plc has been named Africa’s Best Bank and Nigeria’s Best Bank for the second consecutive year at the Euromoney Awards for Excellence 2026, reinforcing its position as one of Africa’s leadi...

item.title: Premiers Seek Tariff Strategy from Carney Amid U.S. Trade Tensions
item.description: Canada's premiers are meeting with Prime Minister Mark Carney in Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island, to discuss strategies for negotiating with U.S. President Donald Trump amid escalating trade tensi...

item.title: Priyanka Gandhi questions government response to student protests and demands accountability
item.description: Congress MP Priyanka Gandhi Vadra has criticised Prime Minister Narendra Modi over the government's handling of ongoing student protests related to alleged NEET paper leaks and other concerns. Speakin...

item.title: Kenya Dental Association Condemns KMPDC's Plan to Allow Unqualified Practitioners
item.description: The Kenya Dental Association (KDA) has strongly condemned the Kenya Medical Practitioners and Dentists Council (KMPDC) for publishing a scope of practice that could allow unqualified individuals to of...

item.title: Zanzibar invests in early childhood development to boost future workforce
item.description: Zanzibar has launched a Sh500 million facility called the Dr Hussein Ali Mwinyi Childcare Centre as part of the Adopt an ECD Centre Initiative, aimed at strengthening early childhood development (ECD)...

item.title: Toyota, Lexus, and Nissan Recall Popular SUV Models in South Africa Due to Safety Concerns
item.description: The National Consumer Commission (NCC) has announced a product recall involving Nissan Qashqai, Toyota Land Cruiser 300, and Lexus LX600 vehicles in South Africa. Nissan is recalling 314 units of the ...

item.title: Falz clarifies he never supported any politician in 2023 election
item.description: Nigerian rapper Falz has clarified that he never openly supported any politician or political party during the 2023 election. In an interview on Arise TV’s Prime Time programme, Falz addressed public ...

item.title: Brampton MPP faces election finance probe over undeclared family newspaper ads and hotel expenses
item.description: Hardeep Grewal, the Progressive Conservative MPP for Brampton East, is under investigation for alleged violations of election finance rules. The Ontario NDP alleges he failed to declare campaign adver...

item.title: Housemaid and minor arrested for theft in Quezon City
item.description: A housemaid and a minor were arrested for theft in Quezon City, according to a recent news report. The incident involved the unauthorized taking of property from a private residence. Authorities confi...

item.title: New York's Rental Ripoff Report Sparks Concern Over Housing Sector Impact
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's Rental Ripoff Hearing Report, released last week, includes 23 policy recommendations aimed at regulating the private rental housing sector. While the report acknow...

item.title: Sessions Judge and Gunman Killed in Balochistan Attack
item.description: A sessions judge and his gunman were killed in a targeted attack in Balochistan's Mastung district, while an additional judge and another individual sustained critical injuries. The incident occurred ...

item.title: New $21m outreach program addresses rising homelessness on Mornington Peninsula
item.description: The article reports a significant increase in homelessness on the Mornington Peninsula, with numbers tripling in recent years. A new $21 million outreach team has been established to tackle the issue,...

item.title: Labor Conference Addresses Pauline Hanson's Influence and Political Tensions
item.description: The Australian Labor Party's 50th annual conference in Adelaide highlighted tensions with One Nation leader Pauline Hanson, though she was never directly named by Prime Minister Anthony Albanese. Alba...

item.title: Saboti MP Accuses UDA of Voter Importation in Trans Nzoia Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Saboti Member of Parliament Caleb Amisi has accused the ruling United Democratic Alliance (UDA) party of orchestrating a voter importation scheme in Trans Nzoia county, warning of serious consequences...
